espnow.name: espnow.init
espnow.description:
espnow.init(channel?) -> bool
Init WiFi STA + ESP-NOW on given channel.
- channel: number 1-14 (default: 1)

espnow.name: espnow.deinit
espnow.description:
espnow.deinit()
Shut down ESP-NOW and free resources.

espnow.name: espnow.is_initialized
espnow.description:
espnow.is_initialized() -> bool
Returns true if ESP-NOW is initialized.

espnow.name: espnow.add_peer
espnow.description:
espnow.add_peer(mac, channel?, encrypt?, lmk?) -> bool
Add an ESP-NOW peer.
- mac: string "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF" or "aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff" (case-insensitive)
- channel: number 0-14 (default: 0 = current)
- encrypt: bool (default: false)
- lmk: string exactly 16 bytes (default: nil)

espnow.name: espnow.del_peer
espnow.description:
espnow.del_peer(mac) -> bool
Remove an ESP-NOW peer.
- mac: string "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF" (case-insensitive)

espnow.name: espnow.mod_peer
espnow.description:
espnow.mod_peer(mac, channel?, encrypt?, lmk?) -> bool
Modify an existing peer.
- mac: string "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF" (case-insensitive)
- channel: number 0-14 (default: 0 = current)
- encrypt: bool (default: false)
- lmk: string exactly 16 bytes (default: nil)

espnow.name: espnow.peer_exists
espnow.description:
espnow.peer_exists(mac) -> bool
Check if peer is registered.
- mac: string "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF" (case-insensitive)

espnow.name: espnow.peer_count
espnow.description:
espnow.peer_count() -> total, encrypted
Returns two numbers: total peers and encrypted peers.

espnow.name: espnow.send
espnow.description:
espnow.send(mac, data) -> bool
Send data to a peer or broadcast.
- mac: string "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF" (case-insensitive) or nil for broadcast
- data: string, max 1470 bytes (ESP-NOW v2)

espnow.name: espnow.broadcast
espnow.description:
espnow.broadcast(data) -> bool
Broadcast data to all peers.
- data: string, max 1470 bytes (ESP-NOW v2)

espnow.name: espnow.receive
espnow.description:
espnow.receive() -> mac, data | nil
Non-blocking dequeue. Returns mac string + data string, or nil if empty.

espnow.name: espnow.on_receive
espnow.description:
espnow.on_receive(callback)
Register Lua receive callback. Called by poll().
- callback: function(mac: string, data: string)

espnow.name: espnow.on_send
espnow.description:
espnow.on_send(callback)
Register Lua send-status callback. Called by poll().
- callback: function(mac: string, success: bool)

espnow.name: espnow.poll
espnow.description:
espnow.poll()
Process receive/send queues and fire registered Lua callbacks.

espnow.name: espnow.get_mac
espnow.description:
espnow.get_mac() -> string
Returns own MAC address as "AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF".

espnow.name: espnow.get_version
espnow.description:
espnow.get_version() -> number
Returns ESP-NOW protocol version.

espnow.name: espnow.get_channel
espnow.description:
espnow.get_channel() -> number
Returns current WiFi channel (1-14).

espnow.name: espnow.set_channel
espnow.description:
espnow.set_channel(channel) -> bool
Set WiFi channel.
- channel: number 1-14

espnow.name: espnow.set_pmk
espnow.description:
espnow.set_pmk(key) -> bool
Set primary master key for encryption.
- key: string exactly 16 bytes

espnow.name: espnow.MAX_DATA_LEN
espnow.description:
espnow.MAX_DATA_LEN -> 1470
Maximum ESP-NOW v2 payload size in bytes.
